positive: A sophisticated, stylized celestial landscape for apparel printing. The composition features a central, strong silhouette of a crescent moon and geometric constellations interwoven with stylized flora and abstract cosmic dust trails. Utilize a symmetrical, circular arrangement with clean, thick outlines, evoking a blend of Mid-Century Modern and Art Deco graphic design. The color palette must be restricted to three to four deeply contrasting, muted colors: deep indigo, terracotta orange, faded sage green, and cream. Flat, vectorial illustration style, minimalist approach, high contrast, suitable for single-color screen printing or detailed digital direct-to-garment printing.
